orchestrator.description: Drives the initiative workflow. Reads workflow config, tracks state, and delegates to subagents. Never writes code, plans, or reviews.

hl-clarifier.description: Reads the user's raw initiative prompt and produces a structured requirements understanding with clarifying questions. Refines messy prompts before planning.

hl-planner.description: Drafts a broad, milestone-based architectural plan from confirmed requirements and project context overview.

hl-reviewer.description: Reviews a high-level plan against user goals and gathered codebase context for logical soundness and codebase alignment. Returns approve or reject.

context-gatherer.description: Searches the codebase based on the approved high-level plan. Writes findings to context.md for downstream planners and reviewers.

ll-planner.description: Drafts highly specific step-by-step implementation instructions using the approved high-level plan and gathered codebase context.

ll-reviewer.description: Reviews the low-level plan against gathered context to prevent hallucinations and ensure technical feasibility. Returns approve or reject.

test-writer.description: Writes comprehensive automated tests for an initiative based on the finalized low-level plan.

test-reviewer.description: Reviews initiative tests for coverage, accuracy, and logical soundness. Approval triggers a mandatory user HITL gate.

implementer.description: Writes codebase changes for the initiative driven by the finalized low-level plan. Runs tests to self-verify and logs actions.

impl-reviewer.description: Reviews implemented code to ensure all tests pass and implementation aligns strictly with plans. Returns approve or reject.

fix-clarifier.description: Reads the user's issue description and produces a structured issue understanding with clarifying questions. Refines messy bug reports before investigation.

fix-context-gatherer.description: Gathers stack traces, relevant files, and system state related to a reported issue. Writes findings to context.md.

fix-planner.description: Analyzes the issue and gathered context to produce a targeted step-by-step fix-plan.md.

fix-test-writer.description: Writes a targeted test designed to reproduce the reported bug and verify its fix.

fix-test-reviewer.description: Reviews issue reproduction tests for accuracy. Approval triggers a mandatory user HITL gate.

fix-implementer.description: Applies the fix to the codebase according to the validated fix plan and user-approved tests. Logs actions.

fix-reviewer.description: Reviews the bug fix to ensure tests pass and no regressions were introduced. Returns approve or reject.
